problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
mechanism: Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration
hypothesis: If Biochar amendment for soil carbon sequestration is applied to than, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
